# Vendored third-party libraries

All libraries are vendored so the app runs fully offline. Licenses permit
redistribution; original license texts are available at the linked sources.

| File | Library | Version | License | Source |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `d3.v7.min.js` | D3.js | 7.9.0 | ISC | https://github.com/d3/d3 |
| `d3-sankey.min.js` | d3-sankey | 0.12.3 | BSD-3-Clause | https://github.com/d3/d3-sankey |
| `d3.layout.cloud.js` | d3-cloud | 1.2.7 | BSD-3-Clause | https://github.com/jasondavies/d3-cloud |

Note: the original prototype (see `original_code/`) additionally used
ZoomCharts (commercial), amCharts (proprietary free tier), ECharts and
viz.js. None of these are used or redistributed by the rewritten app.
